name: revit_add_point_cloud_instance
description: Creates a PointCloudType and PointCloudInstance using a registered custom point cloud engine.

engine_type.description: Registered engine identifier (e.g. apipc, apipcr, xml)

identifier.description: Point cloud identifier passed to PointCloudType.Create

transform.description: Optional placement transform; omit for identity

notes: Covers AddPredefinedInstanceCommand; pass engine_type apipcr for randomized engine.
